title: CVE-2026-15631: @fastify/http-proxy RCE
summary: [P1] @fastify/http-proxy versions from 9.4.0 up to and including 11.5.0 are vulnerable to RCE, with no available patch. Exploitation in the wild has not been reported, but the vulnerability is considered high-risk due to its potential impact. Why now: Reported vulnerability in widely-used @fastify/http-proxy library. (confidence: 0.80)
classification_reasoning: The vulnerability allows for remote code execution, which is a classic example of an RCE problem type affecting the framework layer.
